definition:
1. hated, abhorred, hateful , (Aeschulus Tragicus):—;with dative hateful  or hostile  to one, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
2. gloomy, sullen , Lat. tristis, (Aeschulus Tragicus); ὁρᾶν στυγνός gloomy  to behold, (Xenophon Historicus);—; στυγνὸς εἴκων yielding sullenly, with an ill grace , (Sophocles Tragicus); neuter as adverb, (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
